translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Your ordinances stand to this day, for all things are servants to You.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: If Your law had not been my delight, then I would have perished in my affliction.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I will never forget Your precepts, for by them You have revived me.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I am Yours; save me, for I have sought Your precepts.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The wicked wait to destroy me, but I will ponder Your testimonies.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I have seen a limit to all perfection, but Your commandment is without limit.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Oh, how I love Your law! All day long it is my meditation.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Your commandments make me wiser than my enemies, for they are always with me.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I have more insight than all my teachers, for Your testimonies are my meditation.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I discern more than the elders, for I obey Your precepts.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I have kept my feet from every evil path, that I may keep Your word.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I have not departed from Your ordinances, for You Yourself have taught me.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: How sweet are Your words to my taste—sweeter than honey in my mouth!
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I gain understanding from Your precepts; therefore I hate every false way.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Your word is a lamp to my feet and a light to my path.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I have sworn and confirmed that I will keep Your righteous judgments.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I am severely afflicted, O LORD; revive me through Your word.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Accept the freewill offerings of my mouth, O LORD, and teach me Your judgments.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I constantly take my life in my hands, yet I do not forget Your law.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The wicked have set a snare for me, but I have not strayed from Your precepts.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Your testimonies are my heritage forever, for they are the joy of my heart.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I have inclined my heart to perform Your statutes, even to the very end.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The double-minded I despise, but Your law I love.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: You are my hiding place and my shield; I put my hope in Your word.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Depart from me, you evildoers, that I may obey the commandments of my God.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Sustain me as You promised, that I may live; let me not be ashamed of my hope.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Uphold me, and I will be saved, that I may always regard Your statutes.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: You reject all who stray from Your statutes, for their deceitfulness is in vain.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: All the wicked on earth You discard like dross; therefore I love Your testimonies.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: My flesh trembles in awe of You; I stand in fear of Your judgments.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I have done what is just and right; do not leave me to my oppressors.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Ensure Your servant’s well-being; do not let the arrogant oppress me.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: My eyes fail, looking for Your salvation, and for Your righteous promise.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Deal with Your servant according to Your loving devotion, and teach me Your statutes.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I am Your servant; give me understanding, that I may know Your testimonies.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: It is time for the LORD to act, for they have broken Your law.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Therefore I love Your commandments more than gold, even the purest gold.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Therefore I admire all Your precepts and hate every false way.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Wonderful are Your testimonies; therefore I obey them.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The unfolding of Your words gives light; it informs the simple.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I open my mouth and pant, longing for Your commandments.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Turn to me and show me mercy, as You do to those who love Your name.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Order my steps in Your word; let no sin rule over me.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Redeem me from the oppression of man, that I may keep Your precepts.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Make Your face shine upon Your servant, and teach me Your statutes.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: My eyes shed streams of tears because Your law is not obeyed.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Righteous are You, O LORD, and upright are Your judgments.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The testimonies You have laid down are righteous and altogether faithful.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: My zeal has consumed me because my foes forget Your words.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Your promise is completely pure; therefore Your servant loves it.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I am lowly and despised, but I do not forget Your precepts.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Your righteousness is everlasting and Your law is true.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Trouble and distress have found me, but Your commandments are my delight.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Your testimonies are righteous forever. Give me understanding, that I may live.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I call with all my heart; answer me, O LORD! I will obey Your statutes.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I call to You; save me, that I may keep Your testimonies.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I rise before dawn and cry for help; in Your word I have put my hope.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: My eyes anticipate the watches of night, that I may meditate on Your word.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Hear my voice, O LORD, according to Your loving devotion; give me life according to Your justice.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Those who follow after wickedness draw near; they are far from Your law.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: You are near, O LORD, and all Your commandments are true.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Long ago I learned from Your testimonies that You have established them forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Look upon my affliction and rescue me, for I have not forgotten Your law.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Defend my cause and redeem me; revive me according to Your word.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Salvation is far from the wicked because they do not seek Your statutes.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Great are Your mercies, O LORD; revive me according to Your ordinances.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Though my persecutors and foes are many, I have not turned from Your testimonies.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I look on the faithless with loathing because they do not keep Your word.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Consider how I love Your precepts, O LORD; give me life according to Your loving devotion.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The entirety of Your word is truth, and all Your righteous judgments endure forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Rulers persecute me without cause, but my heart fears only Your word.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I rejoice in Your promise like one who finds great spoil.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I hate and abhor falsehood, but Your law I love.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Seven times a day I praise You for Your righteous judgments.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Abundant peace belongs to those who love Your law; nothing can make them stumble.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I wait for Your salvation, O LORD, and I carry out Your commandments.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I obey Your testimonies and love them greatly.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I obey Your precepts and Your testimonies, for all my ways are before You.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: May my cry come before You, O LORD; give me understanding according to Your word.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: May my plea come before You; rescue me according to Your promise.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: My lips pour forth praise, for You teach me Your statutes.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: My tongue sings of Your word, for all Your commandments are righteous.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: May Your hand be ready to help me, for I have chosen Your precepts.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I long for Your salvation, O LORD, and Your law is my delight.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Let me live to praise You; may Your judgments sustain me.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I have strayed like a lost sheep; seek Your servant, for I have not forgotten Your commandments.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A song of ascents. In my distress I cried to the LORD, and He answered me.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Deliver my soul, O LORD, from lying lips and a deceitful tongue.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: What will He do to you, and what will be added to you, O deceitful tongue?
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Sharp arrows will come from the warrior, with burning coals of the broom tree!
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Woe to me that I dwell in Meshech, that I live among the tents of Kedar!
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Too long have I dwelt among those who hate peace.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I am in favor of peace; but when I speak, they want war.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A song of ascents. I lift up my eyes to the hills. From where does my help come?
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: My help comes from the LORD, the Maker of heaven and earth.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He will not allow your foot to slip; your Protector will not slumber.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Behold, the Protector of Israel will neither slumber nor sleep.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The LORD is your keeper; the LORD is the shade on your right hand.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The sun will not strike you by day, nor the moon by night.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The LORD will guard you from all evil; He will preserve your soul.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The LORD will watch over your coming and going, both now and forevermore.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A song of ascents. Of David. I was glad when they said to me, “Let us go to the house of the LORD.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Our feet are standing in your gates, O Jerusalem.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Jerusalem is built up as a city united together,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: where the tribes go up, the tribes of the LORD, as a testimony for Israel, to give thanks to the name of the LORD.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For there the thrones of judgment stand, the thrones of the house of David.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Pray for the peace of Jerusalem: “May those who love you prosper.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: May there be peace within your walls, and prosperity inside your fortresses.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For the sake of my brothers and friends, I will say, “Peace be within you.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For the sake of the house of the LORD our God, I will seek your prosperity.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A song of ascents. I lift up my eyes to You, the One enthroned in heaven.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: As the eyes of servants look to the hand of their master, as the eyes of a maidservant look to the hand of her mistress, so our eyes are on the LORD our God until He shows us mercy.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Have mercy on us, O LORD, have mercy, for we have endured much contempt.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: We have endured much scorn from the arrogant, much contempt from the proud.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A song of ascents. Of David. If the LORD had not been on our side—let Israel now declare—
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: if the LORD had not been on our side when men attacked us,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: when their anger flared against us, then they would have swallowed us alive,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: then the floods would have engulfed us, then the torrent would have overwhelmed us,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: then the raging waters would have swept us away.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Blessed be the LORD, who has not given us as prey to their teeth.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: We have escaped like a bird from the snare of the fowler; the net is torn, and we have slipped away.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Our help is in the name of the LORD, the Maker of heaven and earth.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A song of ascents. Those who trust in the LORD are like Mount Zion. It cannot be moved; it abides forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: As the mountains surround Jerusalem, so the LORD surrounds His people, both now and forevermore.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For the scepter of the wicked will not rest upon the land allotted to the righteous, so that the righteous will not put forth their hands to injustice.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do good, O LORD, to those who are good, and to the upright in heart.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: But those who turn to crooked ways the LORD will banish with the evildoers. Peace be upon Israel.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A song of ascents. When the LORD restored the captives of Zion, we were like dreamers.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Then our mouths were filled with laughter, our tongues with shouts of joy. Then it was said among the nations, “The LORD has done great things for them.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The LORD has done great things for us; we are filled with joy.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Restore our captives, O LORD, like streams in the Negev.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Those who sow in tears will reap with shouts of joy.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who goes out weeping, bearing a trail of seed, will surely return with shouts of joy, carrying sheaves of grain.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A song of ascents. Of Solomon. Unless the LORD builds the house, its builders labor in vain; unless the LORD protects the city, its watchmen stand guard in vain.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: In vain you rise early and stay up late, toiling for bread to eat—for He gives sleep to His beloved.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Children are indeed a heritage from the LORD, and the fruit of the womb is His reward.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like arrows in the hand of a warrior, so are children born in one’s youth.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Blessed is the man whose quiver is full of them. He will not be put to shame when he confronts the enemies at the gate.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A song of ascents. Blessed are all who fear the LORD, who walk in His ways!
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For when you eat the fruit of your labor, blessings and prosperity will be yours.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Your wife will be like a fruitful vine flourishing within your house, your sons like olive shoots sitting around your table.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: In this way indeed shall blessing come to the man who fears the LORD.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: May the LORD bless you from Zion, that you may see the prosperity of Jerusalem all the days of your life,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: that you may see your children’s children. Peace be upon Israel!
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A song of ascents. Many a time they have persecuted me from my youth—let Israel now declare—
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: many a time they have persecuted me from my youth, but they have not prevailed against me.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The plowmen plowed over my back; they made their furrows long.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The LORD is righteous; He has cut me from the cords of the wicked.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: May all who hate Zion be turned back in shame.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: May they be like grass on the rooftops, which withers before it can grow,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: unable to fill the hands of the reaper, or the arms of the binder of sheaves.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: May none who pass by say to them, “The blessing of the LORD be on you; we bless you in the name of the LORD.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A song of ascents. Out of the depths I cry to You, O LORD!
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: O Lord, hear my voice; let Your ears be attentive to my plea for mercy.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: If You, O LORD, kept track of iniquities, then who, O Lord, could stand?
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: But with You there is forgiveness, so that You may be feared.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I wait for the LORD; my soul does wait, and in His word I put my hope.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: My soul waits for the Lord more than watchmen wait for the morning—more than watchmen wait for the morning.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: O Israel, put your hope in the LORD, for with the LORD is loving devotion, and with Him is redemption in abundance.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And He will redeem Israel from all iniquity.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A song of ascents. Of David. My heart is not proud, O LORD, my eyes are not haughty. I do not aspire to great things or matters too lofty for me.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Surely I have stilled and quieted my soul; like a weaned child with his mother, like a weaned child is my soul within me.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: O Israel, put your hope in the LORD, both now and forevermore.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A song of ascents. O LORD, remember on behalf of David all the hardships he endured,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: how he swore an oath to the LORD, and vowed to the Mighty One of Jacob:
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “I will not enter my house or get into my bed,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I will not give sleep to my eyes or slumber to my eyelids,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: until I find a place for the LORD, a dwelling for the Mighty One of Jacob.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: We heard that the ark was in Ephrathah; we found it in the fields of Jaar.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Let us go to His dwelling place; let us worship at His footstool.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Arise, O LORD, to Your resting place, You and the ark of Your strength.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: May Your priests be clothed with righteousness, and Your saints shout for joy.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For the sake of Your servant David, do not reject Your anointed one.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The LORD swore an oath to David, a promise He will not revoke: “One of your descendants I will place on your throne.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: If your sons keep My covenant and the testimony I will teach them, then their sons will also sit on your throne forever and ever.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For the LORD has chosen Zion; He has desired it for His home:
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “This is My resting place forever and ever; here I will dwell, for I have desired this home.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I will bless her with abundant provisions; I will satisfy her poor with bread.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I will clothe her priests with salvation, and her saints will sing out in joy.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: There I will make a horn grow for David; I have prepared a lamp for My anointed one.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I will clothe his enemies with shame, but the crown upon him will gleam.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A song of ascents. Of David. Behold, how good and pleasant it is when brothers live together in harmony!
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: It is like fine oil on the head, running down on the beard, running down Aaron’s beard over the collar of his robes.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: It is like the dew of Hermon falling on the mountains of Zion. For there the LORD has bestowed the blessing of life forevermore.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A song of ascents. Come, bless the LORD, all you servants of the LORD who serve by night in the house of the LORD!
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Lift up your hands to the sanctuary and bless the LORD!
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: May the LORD, the Maker of heaven and earth, bless you from Zion.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Hallelujah! Praise the name of the LORD. Give praise, O servants of the LORD,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: who stand in the house of the LORD, in the courts of the house of our God.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Hallelujah, for the LORD is good; sing praises to His name, for it is lovely.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For the LORD has chosen Jacob as His own, Israel as His treasured possession.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For I know that the LORD is great; our Lord is above all gods.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The LORD does all that pleases Him in the heavens and on the earth, in the seas and in all their depths.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He causes the clouds to rise from the ends of the earth. He generates the lightning with the rain and brings forth the wind from His storehouses.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He struck down the firstborn of Egypt, of both man and beast.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He sent signs and wonders into your midst, O Egypt, against Pharaoh and all his servants.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He struck down many nations and slaughtered mighty kings:
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Sihon king of the Amorites, Og king of Bashan, and all the kings of Canaan.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He gave their land as an inheritance, as a heritage to His people Israel.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Your name, O LORD, endures forever, Your renown, O LORD, through all generations.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For the LORD will vindicate His people and will have compassion on His servants.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The idols of the nations are silver and gold, made by the hands of men.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: They have mouths, but cannot speak; they have eyes, but cannot see;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: they have ears, but cannot hear; nor is there breath in their mouths.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Those who make them become like them, as do all who trust in them.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: O house of Israel, bless the LORD; O house of Aaron, bless the LORD;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: O house of Levi, bless the LORD; you who fear the LORD, bless the LORD!
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Blessed be the LORD from Zion—He who dwells in Jerusalem. Hallelujah!
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Give thanks to the LORD, for He is good. His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Give thanks to the God of gods. His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Give thanks to the Lord of lords. His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He alone does great wonders. His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: By His insight He made the heavens. His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He spread out the earth upon the waters. His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He made the great lights—His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: the sun to rule the day, His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: the moon and stars to govern the night. His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He struck down the firstborn of Egypt His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and brought Israel out from among them His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: with a mighty hand and an outstretched arm. His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He divided the Red Sea in two His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and led Israel through the midst, His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: but swept Pharaoh and his army into the Red Sea. His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He led His people through the wilderness. His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He struck down great kings His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and slaughtered mighty kings—His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Sihon king of the Amorites His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and Og king of Bashan—His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and He gave their land as an inheritance, His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: a heritage to His servant Israel. His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He remembered us in our low estate His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and freed us from our enemies. His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He gives food to every creature. His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Give thanks to the God of heaven! His loving devotion endures forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: By the rivers of Babylon we sat and wept when we remembered Zion.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: There on the willows we hung our harps,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: for there our captors requested a song; our tormentors demanded songs of joy: “Sing us a song of Zion.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: How can we sing a song of the LORD in a foreign land?
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: If I forget you, O Jerusalem, may my right hand cease to function.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: May my tongue cling to the roof of my mouth if I do not remember you, if I do not exalt Jerusalem as my greatest joy!
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Remember, O LORD, the sons of Edom on the day Jerusalem fell: “Destroy it,” they said, “tear it down to its foundations!”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: O Daughter of Babylon, doomed to destruction, blessed is he who repays you as you have done to us.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Blessed is he who seizes your infants and dashes them against the rocks.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Of David. I give You thanks with all my heart; before the gods I sing Your praises.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I bow down toward Your holy temple and give thanks to Your name for Your loving devotion and Your faithfulness; You have exalted Your name and Your word above all else.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: On the day I called, You answered me; You emboldened me and strengthened my soul.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: All the kings of the earth will give You thanks, O LORD, when they hear the words of Your mouth.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: They will sing of the ways of the LORD, for the glory of the LORD is great.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Though the LORD is on high, He attends to the lowly; but the proud He knows from afar.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: If I walk in the midst of trouble, You preserve me from the anger of my foes; You extend Your hand, and Your right hand saves me.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The LORD will fulfill His purpose for me. O LORD, Your loving devotion endures forever—do not abandon the works of Your hands.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For the choirmaster. A Psalm of David. O LORD, You have searched me and known me.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: You know when I sit and when I rise; You understand my thoughts from afar.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: You search out my path and my lying down; You are aware of all my ways.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Even before a word is on my tongue, You know all about it, O LORD.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: You hem me in behind and before; You have laid Your hand upon me.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Such knowledge is too wonderful for me, too lofty for me to attain.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Where can I go to escape Your Spirit? Where can I flee from Your presence?
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: If I ascend to the heavens, You are there; if I make my bed in Sheol, You are there.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: If I rise on the wings of the dawn, if I settle by the farthest sea,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: even there Your hand will guide me; Your right hand will hold me fast.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: If I say, “Surely the darkness will hide me, and the light become night around me”—
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: even the darkness is not dark to You, but the night shines like the day, for darkness is as light to You.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For You formed my inmost being; You knit me together in my mother’s womb.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I praise You, for I am fearfully and wonderfully made. Marvelous are Your works, and I know this very well.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: My frame was not hidden from You when I was made in secret, when I was woven together in the depths of the earth.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Your eyes saw my unformed body; all my days were written in Your book and ordained for me before one of them came to be.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: How precious to me are Your thoughts, O God, how vast is their sum!
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: If I were to count them, they would outnumber the grains of sand; and when I awake, I am still with You.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: O God, that You would slay the wicked—away from me, you bloodthirsty men—
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: who speak of You deceitfully; Your enemies take Your name in vain.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do I not hate those who hate You, O LORD, and detest those who rise against You?
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I hate them with perfect hatred; I count them as my enemies.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Search me, O God, and know my heart; test me and know my concerns.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: See if there is any offensive way in me; lead me in the way everlasting.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For the choirmaster. A Psalm of David. Rescue me, O LORD, from evil men. Protect me from men of violence,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: who devise evil in their hearts and stir up war all day long.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: They sharpen their tongues like snakes; the venom of vipers is on their lips. Selah
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Guard me, O LORD, from the hands of the wicked. Keep me safe from men of violence who scheme to make me stumble.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The proud hide a snare for me; the cords of their net are spread along the path, and lures are set out for me. Selah
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I say to the LORD, “You are my God.” Hear, O LORD, my cry for help.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: O GOD the Lord, the strength of my salvation, You shield my head in the day of battle.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Grant not, O LORD, the desires of the wicked; do not promote their evil plans, lest they be exalted. Selah
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: May the heads of those who surround me be covered in the trouble their lips have caused.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: May burning coals fall on them; may they be thrown into the fire, into the miry pits, never to rise again.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: May no slanderer be established in the land; may calamity hunt down the man of violence.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I know that the LORD upholds justice for the poor and defends the cause of the needy.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Surely the righteous will praise Your name; the upright will dwell in Your presence.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A Psalm of David. I call upon You, O LORD; come quickly to me. Hear my voice when I call to You.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: May my prayer be set before You like incense, my uplifted hands like the evening offering.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Set a guard, O LORD, over my mouth; keep watch at the door of my lips.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not let my heart be drawn to any evil thing or take part in works of wickedness with men who do iniquity; let me not feast on their delicacies.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Let the righteous man strike me; let his rebuke be an act of loving devotion. It is oil for my head; let me not refuse it. For my prayer is ever against the deeds of the wicked.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: When their rulers are thrown down from the cliffs, the people will listen to my words, for they are pleasant.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: As when one plows and breaks up the soil, so our bones have been scattered at the mouth of Sheol.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: But my eyes are fixed on You, O GOD the Lord. In You I seek refuge; do not leave my soul defenseless.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Keep me from the snares they have laid for me, and from the lures of evildoers.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Let the wicked fall into their own nets, while I pass by in safety.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A Maskil of David, when he was in the cave. A prayer. I cry aloud to the LORD; I lift my voice to the LORD for mercy.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I pour out my complaint before Him; I reveal my trouble to Him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Although my spirit grows faint within me, You know my way. Along the path I travel they have hidden a snare for me.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Look to my right and see; no one attends to me. There is no refuge for me; no one cares for my soul.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I cry to You, O LORD: “You are my refuge, my portion in the land of the living.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Listen to my cry, for I am brought quite low. Rescue me from my pursuers, for they are too strong for me.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Free my soul from prison, that I may praise Your name. The righteous will gather around me because of Your goodness to me.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A Psalm of David. O LORD, hear my prayer. In Your faithfulness, give ear to my plea; in Your righteousness, answer me.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not bring Your servant into judgment, for no one alive is righteous before You.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For the enemy has pursued my soul, crushing my life to the ground, making me dwell in darkness like those long since dead.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: My spirit grows faint within me; my heart is dismayed inside me.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I remember the days of old; I meditate on all Your works; I consider the work of Your hands.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I stretch out my hands to You; my soul thirsts for You like a parched land. Selah
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Answer me quickly, O LORD; my spirit fails. Do not hide Your face from me, or I will be like those who descend to the Pit.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Let me hear Your loving devotion in the morning, for I have put my trust in You. Teach me the way I should walk, for to You I lift up my soul.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Deliver me from my enemies, O LORD; I flee to You for refuge.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Teach me to do Your will, for You are my God. May Your good Spirit lead me on level ground.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For the sake of Your name, O LORD, revive me. In Your righteousness, bring my soul out of trouble.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And in Your loving devotion, cut off my enemies. Destroy all who afflict me, for I am Your servant.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Of David. Blessed be the LORD, my Rock, who trains my hands for war, my fingers for battle.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He is my steadfast love and my fortress, my stronghold and my deliverer. He is my shield, in whom I take refuge, who subdues peoples under me.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: O LORD, what is man, that You regard him, the son of man that You think of him?
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Man is like a breath; his days are like a passing shadow.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Part Your heavens, O LORD, and come down; touch the mountains, that they may smoke.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Flash forth Your lightning and scatter them; shoot Your arrows and rout them.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Reach down from on high; set me free and rescue me from the deep waters, from the grasp of foreigners,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: whose mouths speak falsehood, whose right hands are deceitful.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I will sing to You a new song, O God; on a harp of ten strings I will make music to You—
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: to Him who gives victory to kings, who frees His servant David from the deadly sword.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Set me free and rescue me from the grasp of foreigners, whose mouths speak falsehood, whose right hands are deceitful.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Then our sons will be like plants nurtured in their youth, our daughters like corner pillars carved to adorn a palace.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Our storehouses will be full, supplying all manner of produce; our flocks will bring forth thousands, tens of thousands in our fields.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Our oxen will bear great loads. There will be no breach in the walls, no going into captivity, and no cry of lament in our streets.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Blessed are the people of whom this is so; blessed are the people whose God is the LORD.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A Psalm of praise. Of David. I will exalt You, my God and King; I will bless Your name forever and ever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Every day I will bless You, and I will praise Your name forever and ever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Great is the LORD and greatly to be praised; His greatness is unsearchable.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: One generation will commend Your works to the next, and will proclaim Your mighty acts—
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: the glorious splendor of Your majesty. And I will meditate on Your wondrous works.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: They will proclaim the power of Your awesome deeds, and I will declare Your greatness.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: They will extol the fame of Your abundant goodness and sing joyfully of Your righteousness.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The LORD is gracious and compassionate, slow to anger and abounding in loving devotion.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The LORD is good to all; His compassion rests on all He has made.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: All You have made will give You thanks, O LORD, and Your saints will bless You.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: They will tell of the glory of Your kingdom and speak of Your might,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: to make known to men Your mighty acts and the glorious splendor of Your kingdom.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Your kingdom is an everlasting kingdom, and Your dominion endures through all generations. The LORD is faithful in all His words and kind in all His actions.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The LORD upholds all who fall and lifts up all who are bowed down.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The eyes of all look to You, and You give them their food in season.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: You open Your hand and satisfy the desire of every living thing.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The LORD is righteous in all His ways and kind in all His deeds.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The LORD is near to all who call on Him, to all who call out to Him in truth.
